steps.title: Use the battery clue
steps.content: The next sentence explains the problem: new batteries cannot be put in once the old ones stop working. The blank must describe removing an old battery and putting in a new one.

steps.title: Choose the swap word
steps.content: Choice A means evaluated, Choice B means created for the first time, and Choice C means stopped from happening. None matches exchanging an old battery for a new one. The needed word means swapped out for a substitute. The answer is D.
